hero.title: Xclusive
hero.subtitle: Precision cuts. Flawless fades. An experience crafted for those who demand the best.

about.label: About Us
about.heading: More Than a Cut —
about.body1: At Xclusive Barbershop, every appointment is more than a haircut — it's a statement. Our master barbers blend precision technique with a sharp eye for style, delivering results that turn heads and build confidence.
about.body2: Located in the heart of Houston, TX, we've built a reputation for excellence, consistency, and an atmosphere where every client feels at home.
about.imageAlt: Barber at work at Xclusive Barbershop

faq.question: Do I need an appointment?
faq.answer: Walk-ins are welcome, but appointments are strongly recommended to secure your preferred time and barber. You can book by calling 713-412-7282 or booking online.

faq.question: How long does a typical appointment take?
faq.answer: A standard cut takes 30–45 minutes. The full Xclusive package with beard work and hot towel takes 60–75 minutes. We never rush — quality takes the time it needs.

faq.question: Do you do hair designs?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Custom hair designs are one of our specialties. Bring a reference image or describe your vision and we'll make it happen. Designs start at $45 depending on complexity.

faq.question: Do you cut kids' hair?
faq.answer: Yes! Kids 12 and under receive our Essential cut at a special price. We're patient, friendly, and know how to make the experience comfortable for young clients.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept cash, all major credit/debit cards, Zelle, CashApp, and Apple Pay. Tipping in cash is always appreciated but never required.
